buttons.label: add button
buttons.tooltip: Add another launcher button for one of the built-in Blender actions.

buttons.label: style
buttons.tooltip: Change launcher size, spacing, rows, and colors.

buttons.label: alignment tools
buttons.tooltip: Open FlowCell alignment controls for active-object min, center, max, surface, and geocenter alignment.

buttons.label: flatten revolve
buttons.tooltip: Flatten the active mesh into a centered profile, hide the source object, and revolve the profile in place.

buttons.label: Smart Axis Lock
buttons.tooltip: Open Smart Axis Lock controls for Baseline, Live, and X/Y/Z side toggles.

buttons.label: Cursor Center Hole
buttons.tooltip: With one hole wall face selected in Edit Mode, finds the center point and moves the 3D cursor to it.

buttons.label: save stl
buttons.tooltip: Export the selected mesh objects to 01 src\04 assets\03 3d as a uniquely named STL.

buttons.label: save png
buttons.tooltip: Render the active selected object from the current scene camera to 01 src\04 assets\01 images as a transparent PNG cropped exactly to the visible object bounds.

buttons.label: cura
buttons.tooltip: Export the selected mesh objects as STL files and add them to Cura.

buttons.label: orca
buttons.tooltip: Export the selected mesh objects as STL files and add them to Orca.

buttons.label: make layers
buttons.tooltip: Create Live, Snapshots, Trash, and Archive if missing.

buttons.label: sort
buttons.tooltip: Sort by visibility: visible objects become Live, matching invisible family objects become Snapshots as s#, and other invisible objects become Trash as t#.

buttons.label: Sort Live
buttons.tooltip: Move every currently hidden object under Live into Trash.

buttons.label: snapshot
buttons.tooltip: Save the selected Live objects into Snapshots.

buttons.label: back
buttons.tooltip: Move current Live to Trash and restore the latest snapshot for the selected target.

buttons.label: restore
buttons.tooltip: Copy selected snapshot, trash, or archive objects into Live and move the current Live version to Trash first.

buttons.label: add to live
buttons.tooltip: Copy selected snapshot, trash, or archive objects into Live without replacing the current Live version.

buttons.label: trash
buttons.tooltip: Move selected objects into Trash.

buttons.label: archive
buttons.tooltip: Copy selected objects into Archive.

buttons.label: empty trash
buttons.tooltip: Delete everything inside Trash.

buttons.label: new collection
buttons.tooltip: Prompt for a name and create a new child collection near the selected object.

buttons.label: empty collections
buttons.tooltip: Delete empty collections while keeping the system roots.

buttons.label: cycle collection
buttons.tooltip: Use the selected object's collection and show one direct object at a time while selecting it.

buttons.label: cycle versions
buttons.tooltip: With one selected Live object, cycle Live and snapshot versions one visible object at a time.
